prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Mazda MZR-R 2.0L 4-cylinder (LF-DE) rotary-ported hybrid** with a **Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger** (1.28 A/R turbine housing) and **Precision Turbo wastegate (50mm, 44mm dual-port)** for 650whp on E85, utilizing a **Cosworth Pectel SQ6M ECU** with custom rotary-specific fuel and ignition maps

Full **Tomei 272° duration, 11.5mm lift camshafts** (custom-ground for rotary apex seal clearance) paired with **Ferrea R5-series titanium valves** and **Supertech dual valve springs** (120 lbs seat pressure) for high-RPM stability (10,500 RPM redline)

Custom **Nismo 4.11:1 final drive ratio** with a **OS Giken Super Lock LSD** (2-way, 85% lockup) and **AP Racing CP8466 6-piston front/4-piston rear brake calipers** with **DBA 5000 Series rotors** (356mm front, 330mm rear) for endurance track use
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (carbon fiber, Furai-specific fender flares with integrated NACA ducts for rotor cooling) paired with a **Veilside Fortune 03 rear diffuser** (modified for rotary exhaust routing)

**RE Amemiya GT-II carbon fiber hood** (with dual central vents for turbo heat extraction) and **C-West front bumper** (customized with **Mazdaspeed RX-8 GT wing mounts** for a **Voltex Type-8 rear wing** in 3K twill carbon fiber)

**Work Meister S1 3P 18x10.5 +25 front / 18x12 +35 rear wheels** (ET25 front, ET35 rear) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/18 front, 315/30/18 rear)** with **Project Kics R40 lug nuts** (blue anodized, extended thread for widebody clearance)
